_comment: Curated radio frequencies for non-amateur categories, keyed by NORAD ID. Frequencies in Hz. GNSS entries are auto-assigned per constellation from public ICDs. Amateur sats are seeded from amateur_radio_data.json. Generated by backend/scripts/build_satellite_radio_extra.py.

25544.radio_notes: ISS ham radio (RS0ISS/NA1SS): V/V FM voice repeater 145.990 up (67.0 Hz CTCSS) / 437.800 down; APRS digipeater 145.825 (1k2 AFSK); SSTV 145.800 (PD120); ARISS school contacts 145.800 down / 144.490 up. EVA/spacewalk: US space-to-space UHF ~414.2 / 417.1 MHz (S-band relay via TDRS); Russian Orlan/Soyuz VHF 121.75 / 130.165 / 143.625 MHz.

49044.radio_notes: ISS Nauka (MLM) module — part of the ISS complex; shares ISS comms (S-band TDRS, VHF).

36086.radio_notes: ISS Poisk (MRM-2) module — part of the ISS complex; Russian-segment VHF/S-band.

48274.radio_notes: China Space Station core (Tianhe). Amateur UHF payload; TT&C via Tianlian (S/Ka-band relay). Feitian EVA suit UHF comms.

54216.radio_notes: CSS Mengtian lab module — part of the CSS complex (S/Ka-band TT&C via Tianlian).

53239.radio_notes: CSS Wentian lab module — part of the CSS complex (S/Ka-band TT&C via Tianlian).

40069.radio_notes: Meteor-M N2 LRPT 137.100 MHz (digital QPSK 72k, SatDump); HRPT L-band 1700.0 MHz.

44387.radio_notes: Meteor-M2-2 LRPT 137.900 MHz (intermittent history); HRPT L-band.

57166.radio_notes: Meteor-M2-3 LRPT 137.900 MHz (QPSK); HRPT L-band 1700 MHz.

43013.radio_notes: NOAA-20 (JPSS-1) HRD X-band 7812 MHz; no APT/HRPT.

43010.radio_notes: FengYun-3D AHRPT 1704.5 MHz; MPT X-band 7820 MHz.

43823.radio_notes: GEO-KOMPSAT-2A / GK-2A (KMA, geo) LRIT/HRIT L-band ~1692.14 MHz.

38552.radio_notes: Meteosat-10 / MSG-3 (EUMETSAT, geo) HRIT/LRIT L-band 1691/1695.15 MHz; EUMETCast.

40732.radio_notes: Meteosat-11 / MSG-4 (EUMETSAT, geo) prime service; L-band 1691 MHz.

28912.radio_notes: Meteosat-9 / MSG-2 (EUMETSAT, geo) backup/rapid-scan; L-band 1691 MHz.

54743.radio_notes: Meteosat-12 / MTG-I1 (EUMETSAT, geo) FCI via EUMETCast; raw downlink Ka-band.

35491.radio_notes: GOES-14 (NOAA, geo) on-orbit storage; legacy GVAR/HRIT L-band.

41866.radio_notes: GOES-16 (GOES-East legacy/standby). GRB L-band 1686.6 MHz; HRIT 1694.1 MHz.

43226.radio_notes: GOES-17 (GOES-West legacy). GRB L-band 1686.6 MHz; HRIT 1694.1 MHz.

51850.radio_notes: GOES-18 (GOES-West operational). GRB 1686.6 MHz; HRIT 1694.1 MHz.

60133.radio_notes: GOES-19 (GOES-East operational). GRB 1686.6 MHz; HRIT 1694.1 MHz.

39216.radio_notes: INSAT-3D (ISRO/IMD, geo) LRIT/meteorological data L-band ~1691 MHz.

20580.radio_notes: Hubble Space Telescope — S-band TT&C via TDRS (~2287.5 MHz); science data S/Ku-band.

25867.radio_notes: Chandra X-ray Observatory (CXO) — DSN S-band TT&C.

25994.radio_notes: Terra (EOS AM-1) — direct broadcast X-band 8212.5 MHz; S-band TT&C.

36395.radio_notes: SDO (Solar Dynamics Observatory, geo) — Ka-band science 26.5 GHz; S-band TT&C.

33053.radio_notes: Fermi Gamma-ray (FGST/GLAST) — S-band TT&C via TDRS.

28485.radio_notes: Swift — S-band TT&C; Malindi ground station.

38358.radio_notes: NuSTAR — X-band science downlink; S-band TT&C.

36508.radio_notes: CryoSat-2 (ESA) — X-band science 8100 MHz; S-band TT&C.

43194.radio_notes: Zhangheng-1 (CSES-1) — S-band TT&C; also carries amateur-coordinated science.

39088.radio_notes: Sapphire (Canadian SSA) — military space-surveillance optical payload; TT&C not publicly published. No open-listen downlink.

31797.radio_notes: SAR-Lupe 2 (German recon) — X-band SAR radar; comms/TT&C classified. No public downlink.
